title: Sassy Scissors
bio: Snipella Spark is a sassy pair of scissors who only cuts crooked paper on purpose. She feels dramatic, wears sparkle freckles, and once gave a ribbon a very judgmental trim.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw two long thin blade shapes crossing near the middle. Add two oval handle loops at the bottom.
steps.hint: Use simple capsules for the handles and long triangles for the blades.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place the face near the hinge area. Add narrow eyes, sharp raised eyebrows, and a tiny side smile.
steps.hint: A side smile and lifted eyebrow make Snipella look extra sassy.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a round hinge dot, sparkle freckles, little cut paper triangles, and a wavy ribbon nearby.
steps.hint: The paper scraps can be tiny triangles and rectangles floating around.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the blades, handles, hinge, face, ribbon, and paper scraps. Keep the crossed shape easy to read.
steps.hint: Make the blade lines clean and simple so they do not look tangled.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the blades, handles, hinge, and accents. Add soft shadows where the blades cross.
steps.hint: A tiny darker spot under the hinge makes the scissors feel connected.
